title: Making plans with friends
explanation:
Making plans

Transcript

Lucy: Are you free on Saturday?
Ben: I think so. Why?
Lucy: A few of us are going to the cinema. Do you want to come?
Ben: Sure! What time?
Lucy: The film starts at seven. Let's meet at half past six outside.
Ben: OK. See you then!

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: They will meet at [*half past six|seven|five].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option.

questions.text: Lucy asks: 'Are you ____ on Saturday?' | *free | late | sure
Ben says: '____! What time?' | *Sure | Sorry | Never
They meet ____ the cinema. | *outside | inside | behind

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: Lucy invites Ben by asking if he wants to [*come|leave|pay].
They agree to meet [*before|after|during] the film.
questions.feedback: Half past six, film at seven.
